title: Add dedicated Product Management page with inventory controls and Order tracking dashboard

requirements.text: Create a dedicated Product Management page separate from the main admin dashboard where admins can view all products in a table format with columns for product name, price (₹), description, image, category, and current stock quantity

quotes: where i can change product , rupee and iteam name add or sub

acceptanceCriteria: A new route '/admin/products' exists and is accessible from the admin dashboard
Products are displayed in a table with all required fields visible
The page is protected by AdminGuard and requires authentication

requirements.text: Add inventory adjustment controls on the Product Management page allowing admins to add or subtract stock quantities for existing products with numeric input and increment/decrement buttons

quotes: Adjust inventory quantities (stock count) for existing products

acceptanceCriteria: Each product row has stock adjustment controls (+ and - buttons or numeric input)
Stock quantity updates are persisted to the backend immediately
Current stock count is displayed and updates in real-time after changes
Stock cannot be reduced below zero

requirements.text: Implement full CRUD operations on the Product Management page: allow admins to add new products with all fields (name, price in rupees, description, image, category, stock quantity), edit existing products, and remove products from the catalog

quotes: change product , rupee and iteam name

acceptanceCriteria: An 'Add Product' button opens a form to create new products with all required fields
Each product has 'Edit' and 'Delete' action buttons
Editing opens a form pre-filled with current product data
Delete action shows confirmation dialog before removing product
All changes persist to the backend and refresh the product list

requirements.text: Create an Orders Dashboard section within the admin panel that displays all incoming customer orders in real-time with order details including order ID, customer information, ordered products with quantities, total price, order status, and timestamp

quotes: when some one order their i will see too
Orders Dashboard: Real-time view of all customer orders

acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated Orders section is accessible from the admin panel navigation
All orders are displayed in a table or card layout showing key information
Order details include customer shipping information (name, phone, address, city)
Each order shows the list of products ordered with quantities and prices
Orders display their current status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered)
Orders are sorted by most recent first

requirements.text: Add navigation link in the main admin dashboard header to access the new Product Management page
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Product Management' or 'Manage Products' link appears in the admin navigation
Clicking the link navigates to the Product Management page
The link is only visible to authenticated admin users

constraints: Must use existing backend CRUD operations for products (createProduct, updateProduct, deleteProduct already implemented)
Must use existing order retrieval functions (getAllOrders already implemented)
Must maintain single-actor Motoko architecture in backend/main.mo
Product Management page must be protected with AdminGuard for admin-only access
Must use existing Internet Identity authentication system
Stock quantity must remain a Nat type and cannot go below zero
nonGoals: Creating a new authentication system (Internet Identity already implemented)
Modifying the existing public product catalog page
Adding real-time WebSocket notifications for new orders
